theme: Tarmoq chuqur — DNS, TLS, HTTP debug (to'liq kun)

tasks.title: Tashqi (public) IP
tasks.why: Serverning tashqi IP manzili — internetда qanday ko'rinishi.
steps: Tashqi IP ni ol:  curl -s https://api.ipify.org > pubip.txt

tasks.title: Routing jadvali
tasks.why: Paket qayerga ketadi? ip route — yo'nalish jadvali.

tasks.title: A yozuv (dig)
steps: github.com ning A (IPv4) yozuvini yoz:  dig +short github.com A > a.txt

tasks.title: HTTP status kodi
tasks.why: Faqat status kodini olish — tez tekshiruv.

tasks.title: Port ochiqligini tekshir (nc)
steps: nc -z -w3 github.com 443 && echo open > port.txt || echo closed > port.txt

tasks.title: MX yozuvlari
steps: gmail.com pochta serverlarini yoz:  dig +short MX gmail.com > mx.txt

tasks.title: TXT yozuvlari
tasks.why: TXT — SPF, domen tasdiqlash kabi matn yozuvlar.
steps: google.com TXT yozuvlarini yoz:  dig +short TXT google.com > txt.txt

tasks.title: TLS sertifikat muddati
tasks.why: Sertifikat eskirgan bo'lsa — sayt 'xavfsiz emas'. openssl bilan tekshir.
steps: echo | openssl s_client -connect github.com:443 -servername github.com 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -dates > cert.txt

tasks.title: To'liq HTTP header'lar
tasks.why: Header'lar — server, kesh, yo'naltirish haqida ma'lumot.

tasks.title: Day-5 dns + Day-4 grep
tasks.why: Day-5 resolve + Day-4 awk: domen IP sini ajratib ol.

tasks.title: Day-4 grep + ss
tasks.why: Day-4 grep: ss natijasidan LISTEN portlarni ajrat.

tasks.title: TLS tekshiruvi
steps: echo | openssl s_client -connect github.com:443 -servername github.com 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -dates > netdiag/out/tls.txt

tasks.title: Hisobotni birlashtir (skript)
tasks.why: Loyiha yakuni: DNS + HTTP + TLS holatini bitta hisobotга.
steps: netdiag/check.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash): dns va tls fayllarini birlashtirsin + status kodi
Masalan:  echo '== NET DIAG =='; echo 'DNS:'; cat netdiag/out/dns.txt; echo 'TLS:'; cat netdiag/out/tls.txt

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: 'Sayt ochilmayapti' — qaysi tartibда (DNS→port→TLS→HTTP) tekshirishni ustozга ayt
